group: platform-eng
mode: rwxr-x- - -
default-mode: rwxrwx- - -
default-group: platform-eng" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="250" x="460" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ns_icon" parent="ns" style="text;html=0;fontSize=24;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="📁" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="40" x="420" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1" parent="ns" style="swimlane;startSize=26;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;rounded=1;arcSize=10;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;container=1;" value="<b>report-gen</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="310" x="30" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1_annot" parent="t1" style="text;html=0;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Courier New;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#cccccc;rounded=1;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;spacingRight=8;spacingBottom=4;" value="owner-sub: alice-uuid
group: platform-eng
mode: rwxr-x- - -" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="15" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" parent="ns" style="swimlane;startSize=26;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;rounded=1;arcSize=10;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;container=1;" value="<b>slack-notify</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="310" x="390" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2_annot" parent="t2" style="text;html=0;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Courier New;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#cccccc;rounded=1;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;spacingRight=8;spacingBottom=4;" value="owner-sub: bob-uuid
group: platform-eng
mode: rwx- - - - - -" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="15" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#333333;" value="Two-Layer Permission Check" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="200" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="caller" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;" value="<b>Caller</b>
(OIDC identity)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="80" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bearer" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" value="Bearer
token?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="100" x="260" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ns_check" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" value="<b>1. Namespace Check</b>
owner/group/others
bits on namespace" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="410" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t_check" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" value="<b>2. Tentacle Check</b>
owner/group/others
bits on tentacle" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="620" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="allow" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="ALLOW" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="80" x="820" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="deny_ns" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="DENY" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="70" x="455" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="deny_t" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="DENY" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="70" x="665" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bypass" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="ALLOW
(bypass)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="76" x="272" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="caller" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#666666;" target="bearer"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="bearer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;" target="ns_check" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2b" edge="1" parent="1" source="bearer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" target="bypass" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ns_check" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" target="t_check" value="Pass"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3b" edge="1" parent="1" source="ns_check" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" target="deny_ns" value="Fail"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="t_check" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" target="allow" value="Pass"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4b" edge="1" parent="1" source="t_check" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" target="deny_t" value="Fail"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=26;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#cccccc;rounded=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;container=1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="720" x="80" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend_title" parent="legend" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#333333;" value="<b>Permission Bits by style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;rounded=1;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;" value="<b>Namespace (directory)</b>
